titleStmt.title: SII 26.357: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 357. (A.R. No. 338 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains a praśasti of the king commencing with ••• •••

It states that the residents of the four ūr (places) viz., Madhurāntakanallūr in Kaṉṟūr-nāḍu in Maṇayiṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, Maṭṭai-nāḍu in Śeṅgāṭṭu-nāḍu, Narasiṅgamaṅgalam, and Aśvadaraiyaṉ-kāraṇai, decided to sell their lands in the 2nd year of the king, because of the fact that they could not identify as to which belonged to whom. Then on the offer made by the Śivabrāhmaṇa Ēṟaṉ Akkāḷi-bhaṭṭaṉ of Kāśyapa-gōtra of the temple of the god Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiyār of Madhurāntakanallūr to purchase the lands, they were sold to him by the ūravars of the four places mentioned above. He reclaimed the lands and made them cultivable. He later on, from the 20th year of the king, gifted the lands to the temple mentioned above, to provide for various services, worship, conduct of festivals, etc., therein.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
r nilaikeṭa vikkalar ciṅkaṇar melkaṭal pāyat
tikkaṉaittun=taṉ cakkaranaṭātti virasiṁhāsanattu
puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟaruḷiya kovirājakecaripaṉma
rāna cakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yā
ṇṭu 2 10 jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaiyiṟ koṭṭattuk kaṉ
ṟūr nāṭṭu maturān=takanallūr Uromum ceṅkāṭu nāṭṭu maṭṭai nā
ṭṭuromum naraciṅkamaṅkalattūromum Aśvataraiyaṉ kāraṇai
Uromum Uṭaiyār śrīvirarajendradevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭā
vatu Iṉṉālūromum Eṅkaḷu teṅkaḷuteṉṟu Artthān=tarittu
nila naṭakkavum nilanaṭaikāṇavum māṭṭāmaiyil Iṉṉilattai de
vaṟkuk kuṭuppomeṉṉa maturān=takanallūrt tiruviṟko
lamuṭaiyār koyilil śivabrāhmaṇaṉ kāśyapaṉ Eṟaṉ A
kkāḷi bhaṭṭaṉ Iṉṉilattukku ṉāṉ vilaiyiṭukiṟeṉ Iṉ
ṉālūrirum ṉiṅkaḷ Artthān=taritta ṉilattai ṉāṟperellaiyil kal
naṭṭu Ippaṭi kaviṟṟuttavariyivi
ṭu Ivaṉukku viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Iṉṉālūrom Iṉṉilattukku Aḻivu ce
yvāṉ gaṅgaiyiṭaik kumariyiṭaic ceytāṉ ceyta pāvattaip paṭṭum ti
ruvāṇai maṟuttārp paṭun=taṇṭamum paṭuvom Iṉṉum Iṉṉilam śivabrā
hmaṇaṉ kāśyapaṉ Eṟaṉ Akkāḷibhaṭṭaṉ cakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa
devaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatāvatu mutal kāṭu veṭṭi bhūmi tirutti Iṉṉilattu maturā
n=takanallūr Ūrār pakkapakkal poṉ kuṭuttukkoṇṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟke
llai ṉālūrārum viṟṟa nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai vāṇiyaṉerikku vaṭa
kkum melpāṟkellai Iṭaiyanerikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai perumpūtūreṟ paḷ
ḷaṉ peruvaḻikkum Ampalavanerikkut teṟku ṉāṟ perellaiyuḷḷumakappaṭṭa ṉila
ttile Erikaṭṭi payir ceytu koṇṭu Iṉṉilaṅkoṇṭa Akkāḷibhaṭṭaṉ tāṉ muṉpu ceytu
varukiṟa tiruccān=tāṭalukkāka Uṭaiyār tiruviṟkolamuṭaiyār koyiluḷḷāl śrīmaturān=takavi
ṭaṅkaṟku vaikācit tiruṉāḷ tiruccān=tāṭalukkuc cāntu koḷḷak kācu Oṉṟukkum tiruppaḷḷittāma
ttuk kācu Araiyum Aṟṟaikku ṉokku ṉey ṉāḻikkum Aṟṟaikkut tiruviḷakkeṇ
ṇai Iruṉāḻikkum Aṟṟaikku dānam paṇṇiya poṉ Araikkālukkum tiruvamurtarici tūṇip
patakkukkum kariyamutu ṉālukkum neyyamutu tayiramutu Aṭaikkāyamutukkum Aṟṟai ṉāḷ cevit
ta Aṭiyārkku Ilaipputtarici Ūrkkālāl Irukalattukkum Uṭaiyār tiruviṟkola muṭaiyārkku ma
dhyānna sandhikku tiruponakattukkum Ūrkkālāl Arici ṉāṉāḻikkum kaṟiyamutu neyyamutu tayi
ramutu Aṭaikkāyamutukkum Iṉṉilaṅkoṇṭu Innibaṇḍam ceyvatāka Idha m ce
yteṉ kāśyapaṉ Akkāḷibhaṭṭaṉeṉ Idharmma ceyvāṉ gaṅgaiyiṭai kuma
riyiṭaic ceytāṉ ceyta pāvattaippaṭuvāṉ Idharmma rakṣippāṉ śrīpāta
m Eṉ talaimelitu .§ Aṟamaṟaveṟkaṟamallatu tuṇaiyillai .§
Digital edition of SII 26.357 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
